mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, enabled, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_user WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
